headerDisplay: Control your Quatt Chill airco from HomeKit. **Pairing is required once**: set the CIC hostname below, then run `quatt-chill-pair --cic <cic-hostname>` (or use the plugin's terminal), press the button on your CIC, and paste the returned `installationId` here.
footerDisplay: This plugin uses Quatt's cloud mobile API (reverse-engineered). It depends on Quatt's servers being reachable.

cicId.title: CIC hostname
cicId.description: The hostname of your Quatt CIC (Commander). Used for pairing.

installationId.title: Installation ID
installationId.description: Filled in by the pairing step. Leave blank until you have paired.

heartrateSeconds.title: Poll interval (seconds)
heartrateSeconds.description: How often to poll the Quatt cloud. The cloud refreshes ~once a minute, so 60s is recommended.

tokenFile.title: Token file path
tokenFile.description: Optional. Where to store the auth tokens. Defaults to the Homebridge storage path.
